fixes: Added safeGetItem, safeSetItem, and safeRemoveItem wrappers for localStorage failure modes.
Normalized timer progress by elapsed routine time so large reload/sleep deltas cross multiple steps and complete correctly.
Added ScrollArea primitive and used it in the routine editor.
Fixed mobile sticky action label to show Resume when paused.
Removed secondary blue #2997ff and unified selected state on primary #0066cc.
Softened card borders and removed the white rounded hero timer card wrapper.
Added components.json and serve:dist script, and updated README for Vite React.
verification: Browser smoke found no console errors and no horizontal overflow.
Progress bars expose aria-valuenow and aria-valuemax.
Mobile sticky button shows Resume when paused and remains 44px high.
